title: Rispwind's Biome Realms
description: Adds multiple new dimensions that emulate the "Single Biome" world type.
body:
Have you ever wanted to have an endless version of a particular biome in your existing survival world? Well, then this mod is for you!

Place some Blaze Powder in a blast furnace, take the newly blasted "Blank Essence", and infuse it with items from a particular biome within the crafting interface. Then surround a flint & steel with that particular biome's essence, ignite a portal made of stone with it, and boom! You've found an infinite realm of that particular biome.
This mod is early in development and currently uses a number of placeholder assets. It is, however, fully functional.
A recipe viewer mod is recommended, however obtaining certain items will unlock the Essence recipes in the in-game recipe book.

**Currently, the following biomes have dedicated Biome Realms (with more to come):** Plains, Forest, Desert, Birch Forest, Taiga, Cherry Grove, Badlands, Jungle.
